requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Transport Safety Testing — UN 38.3 (Austria / EU)
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输安全测试——UN 38.3（奥地利／欧盟）
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸安全測試——UN 38.3（奧地利／歐盟）

summary.en: All lithium cells and batteries (including BESS modules) shipped internationally must pass the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 test series (T1–T8). The current edition is Rev.8 (2023) with Amendment 1 (2025). A UN 38.3 test summary or full test report must accompany each shipment. UN numbers are UN 3480 (lithium-ion batteries, packed alone) or UN 3481 (lithium-ion batteries contained in or packed with equipment). Austria is landlocked — sea freight must route via Hamburg (Germany), Koper (Slovenia), or Trieste (Italy) before overland delivery into Austria. Transport by road in Europe is governed by ADR; by sea by IMDG Code; by air by IATA DGR. The road leg within Austria and across the EU is subject to ADR 2025 at all times.
summary.zh: 所有国际运输的锂电芯及电池（包括BESS模块）须通过《联合国关于危险货物运输的建议书——试验和标准手册》第三部分第38.3节T1–T8系列测试。现行版本为Rev.8（2023年）及修正案1（2025年）。每票货物须随附UN 38.3测试摘要或完整报告。UN编号分类为UN 3480（单独包装的锂离子电池）或UN 3481（与设备一同或含于设备内的锂离子电池）。奥地利为内陆国，海运须经汉堡（德国）、科佩尔（斯洛文尼亚）或的里雅斯特（意大利）港口后陆路进入奥地利。欧洲公路运输受ADR规管，海运受IMDG Code规管，空运受IATA DGR规管。奥地利境内及欧盟境内公路段均须全程遵守ADR 2025。
summary.zht: 所有國際運輸的鋰電芯及電池（包括BESS模組）須通過《聯合國關於危險貨物運輸的建議書——試驗和標準手冊》第三部分第38.3節T1–T8系列測試。現行版本為Rev.8（2023年）及修正案1（2025年）。每票貨物須隨附UN 38.3測試摘要或完整報告。UN編號分類為UN 3480（單獨包裝的鋰離子電池）或UN 3481（與設備一同或含於設備內的鋰離子電池）。奧地利為內陸國，海運須經漢堡（德國）、科佩爾（斯洛維尼亞）或的里雅斯特（義大利）港口後陸路進入奧地利。歐洲公路運輸受ADR規管，海運受IMDG Code規管，空運受IATA DGR規管。奧地利境內及歐盟境內公路段均須全程遵守ADR 2025。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 (ST/SG/AC.10/11/Rev.8 (2023) and Amendment 1 (2025))
UN Model Regulations on the Transport of Dangerous Goods, 23rd revised edition — UN 3480 / UN 3481
ADR 2025 — European Agreement concerning the International Carriage of Dangerous Goods by Road (Special Provisions 188, 230, 310, 348, 636, 670)
IMDG Code, Amendment 41-22 — Special Provisions 188, 230, 310, 348, 384, 636
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) 65th Edition 2024 — Special Provisions A88, A99, A154, A164, A183, A201, A206

summary.en: China applies the same UN 38.3 test standard for export shipments and mirrors it in national regulations. For road transport, the standard GB 15599 (Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road) references UN 38.3. Export customs and the Ministry of Transport require a valid UN 38.3 test report and dangerous goods declaration (危险货物运输申报) per JT/T 617 (road) and IMDG/IATA rules for maritime/air. The Civil Aviation Administration of China (CAAC) DGR follows IATA. The exact current edition of GB 15599 and any amendments issued after 2024 are not publicly confirmable via open sources — verify the current edition via SAC or the Ministry of Transport before relying on it.
summary.zh: 中国对出口货物同样适用UN 38.3测试标准，并在国内法规中予以对应。公路运输参照GB 15599（锂电池公路运输安全要求），该标准引用UN 38.3。海关及交通运输部要求持有效UN 38.3测试报告并按JT/T 617（公路）及IMDG/IATA规则进行危险货物申报。中国民用航空局（CAAC）危险品规则遵循IATA。GB 15599的现行有效版本及2024年后的修订情况无法通过公开渠道确认，请在引用前向国家标准化管理委员会或交通运输部核实。
summary.zht: 中國對出口貨物同樣適用UN 38.3測試標準，並在國內法規中予以對應。公路運輸參照GB 15599（鋰電池公路運輸安全要求），該標準引用UN 38.3。海關及交通運輸部要求持有效UN 38.3測試報告並按JT/T 617（公路）及IMDG/IATA規則進行危險貨物申報。中國民用航空局（CAAC）危險品規則遵循IATA。GB 15599的現行有效版本及2024年後的修訂情況無法通過公開渠道確認，請在引用前向國家標準化管理委員會或交通運輸部核實。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (adopted for export)
GB 38031-2020 — Electric vehicles traction battery safety requirements (cell-level UN 38.3 equivalent)
GB 15599 — Safety requirements for transport of lithium batteries by road (current edition not publicly confirmable via open sources — verify via SAC or Ministry of Transport before relying on it)
JT/T 617 — Regulations for road transport of dangerous goods
CAAC Dangerous Goods Regulations (aligned with IATA DGR)

gap.en: Both EU/international and China require UN 38.3 testing, so the test protocol itself is not a gap. Key documentation and logistics gaps for Austria-bound BESS: (1) Austria is landlocked — sea freight enters via Hamburg, Koper, or Trieste; multimodal (sea + road) shipments require ADR re-documentation at the EU port of entry — a step commonly missed by CN-origin shipments prepared only to IMDG. (2) ADR 2025 updates on SOC (≤30%) limits and packaging for large-format BESS cells may not yet be in CN factory SOPs. (3) IATA PI 965/966/967 Wh limits are strictly enforced by EU carriers. (4) EU member states, including Austria, may require prior notification or route approval for large BESS road shipments above defined energy thresholds. (5) CN exporters sometimes hold only a product certificate without the full T1–T8 UN 38.3 summary.
gap.zh: 欧盟/国际与中国均要求UN 38.3测试，测试协议本身不构成差距。奥地利目的地BESS的主要文件与物流差距：(1) 奥地利为内陆国，海运经汉堡、科佩尔或的里雅斯特入境；多式联运（海运+公路）须在欧盟入境港按ADR重新出具文件——仅按IMDG准备的中国发货常遗漏此环节。(2) ADR 2025关于大型BESS电芯荷电状态（SOC≤30%）及包装的更新规定可能尚未纳入中国工厂SOP。(3) IATA PI 965/966/967瓦时限值由欧洲承运人严格执行。(4) 包括奥地利在内的欧盟成员国对超过特定能量阈值的大型BESS公路运输可能要求提前通知或路线审批。(5) 部分中国出口商仅持产品认证证书而无完整UN 38.3 T1–T8摘要。
gap.zht: 歐盟/國際與中國均要求UN 38.3測試，測試協議本身不構成差距。奧地利目的地BESS的主要文件與物流差距：(1) 奧地利為內陸國，海運經漢堡、科佩爾或的里雅斯特入境；多式聯運（海運+公路）須在歐盟入境港按ADR重新出具文件——僅按IMDG準備的中國發貨常遺漏此環節。(2) ADR 2025關於大型BESS電芯荷電狀態（SOC≤30%）及包裝的更新規定可能尚未納入中國工廠SOP。(3) IATA PI 965/966/967瓦時限值由歐洲承運人嚴格執行。(4) 包括奧地利在內的歐盟成員國對超過特定能量閾值的大型BESS公路運輸可能要求提前通知或路線審批。(5) 部分中國出口商僅持產品認證證書而無完整UN 38.3 T1–T8摘要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 compliance and dangerous goods documentation are legal requirements for all international transport modes under ADR/IMDG/IATA; Austrian road legs require full ADR compliance; landlocked status means multimodal routing through EU transit ports is always required.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — UN 38.3 test report required by customs and carriers; GB 38031-2020 mandatory for EV battery cells sold in China.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. A Chinese BESS exporter shipping to Austria must hold a valid UN 38.3 test report (T1–T8 summary) for every cell/module type, classify under UN 3480 or UN 3481, comply with ADR (road — mandatory throughout the EU/Austrian overland leg), IMDG (sea, for the Hamburg/Koper/Trieste leg), or IATA (air) packaging and documentation requirements, and ensure SOC does not exceed 30% where required. Austria's landlocked status requires multimodal planning with ADR re-documentation at the EU port of entry. Consult a certified dangerous goods safety adviser (DGSA) before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。中国BESS出口商向奥地利发货，须为每种电芯/模块型号持有有效UN 38.3测试报告（T1–T8摘要），按UN 3480或UN 3481分类，并符合ADR（公路——欧盟/奥地利全段陆运强制执行）、IMDG（海运，经汉堡/科佩尔/的里雅斯特段）或IATA（空运）包装及文件要求，并在规定情况下确保荷电状态不超过30%。奥地利内陆国状态要求多式联运规划，并须在欧盟入境港重新出具ADR文件。首次发货前请咨询具资质的危险品安全顾问（DGSA）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。中國BESS出口商向奧地利發貨，須為每種電芯/模組型號持有有效UN 38.3測試報告（T1–T8摘要），按UN 3480或UN 3481分類，並符合ADR（公路——歐盟/奧地利全段陸運強制執行）、IMDG（海運，經漢堡/科佩爾/的里雅斯特段）或IATA（空運）包裝及文件要求，並在規定情況下確保荷電狀態不超過30%。奧地利內陸國狀態要求多式聯運規劃，並須在歐盟入境港重新出具ADR文件。首次發貨前請諮詢具資質的危險品安全顧問（DGSA）。

requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Classification, Packaging & Documentation — ADR / IMDG / IATA (Austria Landlocked Routing)
requirement_topic.zh: 危险品分类、包装及文件——ADR / IMDG / IATA（奥地利内陆国路线）
requirement_topic.zht: 危險品分類、包裝及文件——ADR / IMDG / IATA（奧地利內陸國路線）

summary.en: Beyond UN 38.3 testing, EU/international transport law requires: (a) correct UN number (UN 3480/3481) on all shipping documents; (b) UN-certified outer packaging; (c) mode-specific dangerous goods documentation (DGD for air, Dangerous Goods Transport Document for road/sea); (d) emergency response information (ERG, MSDS/SDS); (e) Class 9 hazard label and lithium battery mark on each package outer. For Austria specifically: because Austria is landlocked, all sea shipments route via Hamburg (Germany), Koper (Slovenia), or Trieste (Italy) — requiring multimodal compliance under both IMDG (sea leg) and ADR 2025 (overland EU road leg into Austria). Re-documentation from IMDG to ADR at the EU port of entry is mandatory. Austria and neighbouring transit countries (Germany, Czech Republic, Slovakia, Slovenia, Hungary) apply ADR along the overland route.
summary.zh: 除UN 38.3测试外，欧盟/国际运输法规还要求：(a) 所有运输单证上注明正确UN编号（UN 3480/3481）；(b) UN认证外包装；(c) 按运输方式出具危险品文件（空运DGD，公路/海运危险品运输文件）；(d) 紧急响应信息（ERG、MSDS/SDS）；(e) 每件外包装贴附第9类危险标签及锂电池标识。特别针对奥地利：由于奥地利为内陆国，所有海运须经汉堡（德国）、科佩尔（斯洛文尼亚）或的里雅斯特（意大利）中转——须同时符合IMDG（海运段）和ADR 2025（进入奥地利的欧盟公路段）的多式联运合规要求。在欧盟入境港须将文件从IMDG格式重新出具为ADR格式，此为强制要求。奥地利及过境邻国（德国、捷克、斯洛伐克、斯洛文尼亚、匈牙利）在陆路沿途均适用ADR。
summary.zht: 除UN 38.3測試外，歐盟/國際運輸法規還要求：(a) 所有運輸單證上註明正確UN編號（UN 3480/3481）；(b) UN認證外包裝；(c) 按運輸方式出具危險品文件（空運DGD，公路/海運危險品運輸文件）；(d) 緊急響應信息（ERG、MSDS/SDS）；(e) 每件外包裝貼附第9類危險標籤及鋰電池標識。特別針對奧地利：由於奧地利為內陸國，所有海運須經漢堡（德國）、科佩爾（斯洛維尼亞）或的里雅斯特（義大利）中轉——須同時符合IMDG（海運段）和ADR 2025（進入奧地利的歐盟公路段）的多式聯運合規要求。在歐盟入境港須將文件從IMDG格式重新出具為ADR格式，此為強制要求。奧地利及過境鄰國（德國、捷克、斯洛伐克、斯洛維尼亞、匈牙利）在陸路沿途均適用ADR。

standards_or_laws: ADR 2025 — Chapter 3.3 SP 377, SP 188, SP 230; Section 2.2.9.1; Packing Instructions P903, P908
IMDG Code Amendment 41-22 — SP 188, SP 230, SP 384; Packing Instructions P903, P908
IATA DGR 65th Edition 2024 — Packing Instructions PI 965, PI 966, PI 967; Special Provisions A88, A99, A154, A164, A183
UN Model Regulations 23rd revised edition — Chapter 3.3, Chapter 6.1 packaging requirements
Regulation (EC) No 1272/2008 (CLP) — for SDS/labelling obligations where applicable

summary.en: China's export dangerous goods documentation requirements align with IMDG and IATA for sea and air freight. For road within China, JT/T 617.1-2018 and JT/T 617.4-2018 apply. The CAAC DGR mirrors IATA PI 965/966/967. Export customs (GACC) requires a dangerous goods inspection certificate for certain battery shipments. Packaging must meet GB 12463 for domestic road, or UN-certified packaging for export. The precise scope of GACC inspection certificate requirements for BESS exports is subject to GACC administrative announcements that change periodically; verify the current requirements directly with a licensed Chinese customs broker or GACC before shipment.
summary.zh: 中国出口危险品文件要求与海运IMDG和空运IATA保持一致。中国境内公路运输适用JT/T 617.1-2018和JT/T 617.4-2018。CAAC危险品规则参照IATA PI 965/966/967。海关总署（GACC）对特定电池出口要求危险品检验证书。国内公路运输包装须符合GB 12463，出口须采用UN认证包装。GACC对BESS出口的危险品检验证书要求范围受GACC不定期发布的行政公告规范，出货前请直接向持牌中国报关行或GACC核实现行要求。
summary.zht: 中國出口危險品文件要求與海運IMDG和空運IATA保持一致。中國境內公路運輸適用JT/T 617.1-2018和JT/T 617.4-2018。CAAC危險品規則參照IATA PI 965/966/967。海關總署（GACC）對特定電池出口要求危險品檢驗證書。國內公路運輸包裝須符合GB 12463，出口須採用UN認證包裝。GACC對BESS出口的危險品檢驗證書要求範圍受GACC不定期發布的行政公告規範，出貨前請直接向持牌中國報關行或GACC核實現行要求。

standards_or_laws: JT/T 617.1-2018 — Classification of dangerous goods for road transport (China)
JT/T 617.4-2018 — Packaging and labelling for dangerous goods road transport (China)
GB 12463 — General technical requirements for dangerous goods transport packaging
CAAC Dangerous Goods Regulations (aligned with IATA DGR — exact current edition year not publicly confirmable via open sources; verify via CAAC or a certified DGR trainer before reliance)

GACC dangerous goods inspection requirements for battery exports (exact threshold and scope subject to periodic GACC administrative announcements — verify with a licensed Chinese customs broker before shipment)

gap.en: Key gaps for a Chinese BESS exporter shipping to Austria: (1) Austria is landlocked — all sea shipments require multimodal routing (sea + road), and ADR re-documentation at the EU port of entry (Hamburg, Koper, or Trieste) is mandatory; CN exporters used to IMDG-only workflows must add this step. (2) ADR 2025 requires a Dangerous Goods Safety Adviser (DGSA) to be appointed by the carrier for the EU road leg — not always mirrored in CN export logistics. (3) EU carriers and ports strictly enforce the Class 9 lithium battery mark (with watt-hour rating) on each package outer; CN factories may use older label formats. (4) Austria and German transit routes may require prior notification for large BESS road shipments above defined energy thresholds — CN has no equivalent. (5) CN exporters sometimes hold only a product certificate without the full T1–T8 UN 38.3 summary.
gap.zh: 中国BESS出口商向奥地利发货的主要差距：(1) 奥地利为内陆国——所有海运须多式联运（海运+公路），且在欧盟入境港（汉堡、科佩尔或的里雅斯特）须强制进行ADR文件转换；习惯于仅使用IMDG流程的中国出口商须补充此环节。(2) ADR 2025要求承运人为欧盟公路段任命危险品安全顾问（DGSA）——中国出口物流链中并不总是有对应安排。(3) 欧盟承运人和港口严格要求每件外包装贴附第9类锂电池标记（含瓦时标注）；中国工厂可能沿用旧版标签格式。(4) 奥地利及德国过境路线对超过特定能量阈值的大型BESS公路运输可能要求提前通知——中国无对应要求。(5) 部分中国出口商仅持产品认证证书而无完整UN 38.3 T1–T8摘要。
gap.zht: 中國BESS出口商向奧地利發貨的主要差距：(1) 奧地利為內陸國——所有海運須多式聯運（海運+公路），且在歐盟入境港（漢堡、科佩爾或的里雅斯特）須強制進行ADR文件轉換；習慣於僅使用IMDG流程的中國出口商須補充此環節。(2) ADR 2025要求承運人為歐盟公路段任命危險品安全顧問（DGSA）——中國出口物流鏈中並不總是有對應安排。(3) 歐盟承運人和港口嚴格要求每件外包裝貼附第9類鋰電池標記（含瓦時標注）；中國工廠可能沿用舊版標籤格式。(4) 奧地利及德國過境路線對超過特定能量閾值的大型BESS公路運輸可能要求提前通知——中國無對應要求。(5) 部分中國出口商僅持產品認證證書而無完整UN 38.3 T1–T8摘要。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ADR, IMDG, and IATA dangerous goods documentation, packaging, and labelling requirements are legally binding for all modes; Austria's landlocked status means ADR re-documentation at EU entry ports is always required for sea-origin shipments; non-compliance can result in shipment rejection, fines, or criminal liability.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export — CAAC/IATA and IMDG rules enforced by carriers; JT/T 617 mandatory for domestic road; GACC inspection requirements apply to certain battery exports.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Informational only. Shipping BESS from China to Austria requires a full dangerous goods compliance programme including UN 38.3 test summaries, correct UN number classification, UN-certified packaging, mode-specific documentation (IMDG for sea, ADR for the EU overland leg), Class 9 labels, SOC management, and appointment of a DGSA for EU road legs. Austria's landlocked routing via Hamburg, Koper, or Trieste means multimodal ADR re-documentation at the EU port is always required. Engage a certified DGSA and a specialist dangerous goods freight forwarder before first shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅供参考。从中国向奥地利运输BESS需建立完整的危险品合规体系：UN 38.3测试摘要、正确的UN编号分类、UN认证包装、按运输方式出具文件（海运IMDG，欧盟陆运段ADR）、第9类标签、荷电状态管理，以及为欧盟公路段任命DGSA。奥地利通过汉堡、科佩尔或的里雅斯特的内陆路线意味着须在欧盟入境港进行多式联运ADR文件转换。首次发货前请聘用持证DGSA及专业危险品货代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅供參考。從中國向奧地利運輸BESS需建立完整的危險品合規體系：UN 38.3測試摘要、正確的UN編號分類、UN認證包裝、按運輸方式出具文件（海運IMDG，歐盟陸運段ADR）、第9類標籤、荷電狀態管理，以及為歐盟公路段任命DGSA。奧地利通過漢堡、科佩爾或的里雅斯特的內陸路線意味著須在歐盟入境港進行多式聯運ADR文件轉換。首次發貨前請聘用持證DGSA及專業危險品貨代。
